issues.description: Comment '# (same pattern as lines 936-944)' contains a hardcoded line number that will go stale as the file grows. Prefer a descriptive reference such as '# same pattern as main .result fallback below'.
wc -c pads output with leading spaces on macOS (e.g. '   1024'). Since this is diagnostic logging only it is not a bug, but ${#output} would be cleaner and fully portable.

Timeout .result fallback produces only {status, summary} and omits the field-aware recovery (pr_number, branch, tasks) that the main fallback at lines 974-1042 performs. Unlikely to matter in practice at timeout, but the asymmetry is worth a comment.

Assertion '[[ "$func_def" == *"loop_complete=true"* ]]' is too generic — loop_complete=true appears in three separate branches of run_test_loop (env errors, convergence, tests-passed). The surrounding set_final_state and negative guard assertions compensate, but the assertion does not specifically prove the convergence path uses it.
